summary: Completed Production Hardening Phase 1-8 API testing. All 84 tests pass (26 + 33 + 25). All 12 new endpoints verified and working.

minor.issue: Returns success=false since test credentials don't authenticate with real HotelRunner API - this is expected behavior for sandbox validation

critical_code_review_comments: Phase 1 Sandbox Validation: Returns readiness report with 10 checks, blocker_issues, production_recommendation. Working correctly.
Phase 2 Provider Adapters: Returns correlation_id (UUID), latency_ms (int), success (bool). success=false is expected with test credentials.
Phase 3 AES-256-GCM Encryption: Secure update, rotation, masked view, and migration all working. Algorithm='AES-256-GCM' confirmed in responses.
Phase 4 RBAC: Admin role has full access. RBAC module correctly denies viewer/staff roles (403). Unit test verified.
Phase 5 Reconciliation Health: Returns health_score (0-100), status (healthy/degraded/critical), open_issues, by_severity, by_type. Working.
Phase 6 Scheduler Metrics: Returns metrics.stale_jobs, metrics.requeued_jobs when connector is active. Returns skipped=true with reason for inactive.
Phase 7 Event Sync: Handles booking_created, rate_changed, batch events. Returns handled=true. sync_jobs_created=0 when no active connectors match property_id.
Phase 8 Test Stability: All unit tests pass for encryption, credential vault, sandbox validation, provider adapters.
seed_data_creation: Test connectors created with TEST_ prefix during pytest runs (auto-cleanup on teardown)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 production hardening phases verified. Test suite includes 84 tests covering all 12 new API endpoints. Provider push operations return success=false because test credentials don't authenticate with HotelRunner - this is expected. RBAC 403 behavior tested via unit test since creating restricted-role users is complex.

phase_1_sandbox_validation.POST /api/channel-manager/v2/sandbox/val: WORKING - returns readiness report with total_checks (10), passed_checks, failed_checks, blocker_issues, production_recommendation, checks array

phase_3_aes_256_gcm.PUT /api/channel-manager/v2/connectors/{: WORKING - encrypts with AES-256-GCM, message confirms algorithm
phase_3_aes_256_gcm.POST /api/channel-manager/v2/connectors/: WORKING - rotates with AES-256-GCM, updates rotated_at
phase_3_aes_256_gcm.GET /api/channel-manager/v2/connectors/{: WORKING - returns masked credentials with algorithm=AES-256-GCM, encrypted=true
phase_3_aes_256_gcm.POST /api/channel-manager/v2/connectors/: WORKING - migrates XOR to AES-256-GCM or returns 'Already AES-256-GCM encrypted'

phase_4_rbac.viewer_role_403: VERIFIED via unit test - RBAC module raises 403 for viewer/staff roles

phase_5_reconciliation_health.GET /api/channel-manager/v2/reconciliati: WORKING - returns health_score (0-100), status (healthy/degraded/critical), open_issues, by_severity, by_type

phase_6_scheduler_metrics.POST /api/channel-manager/v2/scheduler/r: WORKING - returns metrics (stale_jobs, requeued_jobs, missing_snapshots, drift_detected) for active connectors, skipped=true for inactive

phase_7_event_sync.POST /api/channel-manager/v2/events/sync: WORKING - processes multiple events in batch

mocked_apis_note: HotelRunner API calls are real but fail with test credentials (expected). All other endpoints use real implementations with MongoDB.
